features.title: SDLC Skill File
features.description: Create plugins/harness/skills/harness-sdlc/SKILL.md containing all six sections: Methodology Selection Matrix, Development Methodology, Testing Strategy, Build & Runtime Verification, Evaluation Criteria Anchors, and Sprint Contract Checklist Templates.
steps: Confirm YAML frontmatter is present and valid
Check Section 1: Methodology Selection Matrix with Agile/Scrum/Waterfall/Kanban/Lean mappings
Check Section 2: Development Methodology with TDD/BDD/DDD/Clean Architecture/Prototype-First guidance
Check Section 3: Testing Strategy with test pyramid and framework auto-detection tables
Check Section 4: Build & Runtime Verification with ORM/database and server detection tables
Check Section 5: Evaluation Criteria Anchors with 0-5 scale for all four criteria
Check Section 6: Sprint Contract Checklist Templates for API/UI/Database/Infrastructure
evidence: 01-evaluation.json: all 5 contract checks pass, all 6 sections verified complete
features.notes: Completed in sprint 1. All sections present with complete content.

features.title: Harness Integration
features.description: Update plugins/harness/skills/harness/SKILL.md to add a reference directing agents to the harness-sdlc skill when domain_profile: software is active. Minimal, non-breaking addition.
steps: Verify a new reference paragraph exists in the Domain Profiles section
Confirm the reference directs agents to harness-sdlc/SKILL.md for software domain projects
Verify no existing content in SKILL.md was corrupted or removed
evidence: 02-evaluation.json: all 3 contract checks pass, reference subsection verified at line 245, no content corrupted
features.notes: Completed in sprint 2. Domain Skill References subsection added under Domain Profiles.

features.title: Plugin Manifest & README
features.description: Update README.md to document the SDLC domain skill: what it provides, how agents use it, and where it lives in the skill directory structure.
steps: Open README.md in the plugin root
Verify a new section documents the SDLC domain skill
Confirm the section explains what the skill provides
Confirm the section explains how agents use it
Confirm the section describes the skill directory structure location
features.notes: Documentation only. Should be written after F-001 and F-002 are confirmed correct.
